properties.name: fileweft.default-tenant-enabled
properties.description: Explicitly enables the fixed single-tenant fallback when no TenantProvider bean is configured. Leave disabled for production multi-tenant deployments.

properties.name: fileweft.default-tenant-id
properties.description: Tenant identifier used only when fileweft.default-tenant-enabled is true. It must be configured explicitly.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.local-enabled
properties.description: Explicitly enables process-local filesystem storage when no customer or plugin StorageAdapter is available. Leave disabled for durable production storage.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.local-root
properties.description: Filesystem root used only when fileweft.storage.local-enabled is true. It must be configured explicitly.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.enabled
properties.description: Enables the optional Alibaba Cloud OSS reference adapter. Requires its artifact and exactly one host-owned OssCredentialsProvider bean.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.endpoint
properties.description: Absolute HTTPS OSS endpoint without credentials, query, fragment, or non-root path.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.region
properties.description: OSS region used for request signing.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.bucket
properties.description: Dedicated OSS bucket selected for FlowWeft objects.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.use-path-style
properties.description: Uses path-style addressing; it cannot be combined with CNAME mode.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.use-cname
properties.description: Uses an OSS CNAME endpoint; it cannot be combined with path-style mode.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.connection-timeout-millis
properties.description: Positive bounded OSS connection timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.socket-timeout-millis
properties.description: Positive bounded OSS socket timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.request-timeout-millis
properties.description: Positive bounded OSS request timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.max-attempts
properties.description: Bounded OSS attempt count from 1 through 10.

properties.name: fileweft.storage.oss.credential-expiry-safety-window-millis
properties.description: Positive safety window applied to rotating OSS credential expiry.

properties.name: fileweft.upload.presigned-enabled
properties.description: Enables durable constrained direct PUT grants and atomic asset claims. Requires one selected PresignedUploadStorageAdapter plus V034 and V035 migration history.

properties.name: fileweft.upload.presigned-finalize-grace-millis
properties.description: Positive time reserved for provider finalization.

properties.name: fileweft.upload.presigned-claim-lease-millis
properties.description: Positive fenced finalization lease no longer than the finalize grace.

properties.name: fileweft.upload.presigned-maintenance-batch-size
properties.description: Worker-only recovery and cleanup batch size from 1 through 1000.

properties.name: fileweft.worker.process-presigned-upload-maintenance
properties.description: Runs presigned recovery and cleanup only on an explicitly enabled worker role.

properties.name: fileweft.persistence.migration-mode
properties.description: Controls FileWeft-owned Flyway startup behavior. DISABLED performs no migration database access, VALIDATE verifies an existing FileWeft schema, and MIGRATE applies pending FileWeft migrations. Enabled modes require exactly one DataSource unless the host supplies an explicit FlywayMigrationRunner. The default is DISABLED.

properties.name: fileweft.persistence.schema
properties.description: Explicit FileWeft schema required when migration mode is VALIDATE or MIGRATE. Blank values, implicit schema selection, and leading or trailing whitespace are rejected for enabled Starter migration modes.

properties.name: fileweft.persistence.create-schema
properties.description: Allows MIGRATE to create the explicitly configured FileWeft schema. A true value is rejected in DISABLED and VALIDATE modes without database access; leave false when schema ownership belongs to the database operator.

properties.name: fileweft.persistence.kingbase-flyway-compatibility-enabled
properties.description: Adapts only Spring Boot Flyway's selected KingbaseES DataSource to the PostgreSQL-compatible Flyway engine while leaving the application's main DataSource unchanged. Disable only when the host supplies an equivalent Kingbase Flyway integration.

properties.name: fileweft.compatibility.legacy-agent-autoconfiguration-enabled
properties.description: Compatibility-only bridge that restores the legacy Agent repository, task, confirmation, and Doctor auto-configuration. It is disabled by default and must not be used as a new Agent product-support contract.
